title: thalictrum angustifolium subsp. exaltatum
intro: Thalictrum angustifolium subsp. exaltatum, also known as exalted meadow rue, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Ranunculaceae. It is a perennial plant that is native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia, and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. Exalted meadow rue contains compounds that have anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties, which can help to reduce pain, prevent infection, and boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or poultice to take advantage of its health benefits, which include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and promoting wound healing.
